text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Out of the blue, Tamamo Cross receives some
devastating news from her family... Her mother
has fallen ill and collapsed.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
While it's nothing life-threatening, the news
affects Tamamo Cross's concentration, resulting
in her getting involved in an accident during her
next scrimmage.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Although she emerges from the collision with only
bruises, she develops a fear of running in a
high-speed pack.
